tools.name: organizations.analyticshubOrganizationsLocationsDataExchangesList
tools.description: Lists all data exchanges from projects in a given organization and location.

tools.name: projects.analyticshubProjectsLocationsDataExchangesList
tools.description: Lists all data exchanges in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.analyticshubProjectsLocationsDataExchangesListingsGet
tools.description: Gets the details of a listing.

tools.name: projects.analyticshubProjectsLocationsDataExchangesListingsList
tools.description: Lists all listings in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.analyticshubProjectsLocationsDataExchangesListingsSubscribe
tools.description: Subscribes to a listing. Currently, with Analytics Hub, you can create listings that reference only BigQuery datasets. Upon subscription to a listing for a BigQuery dataset, Analytics Hub creates a linked dataset in the subscriber's project.

tools.name: projects.analyticshubProjectsLocationsDataExchangesListingsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns the permissions that a caller has.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
